what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-23 in the design-source channel under capital-raise; it stores YAML frontmatter with identifiers, a blob pointer, MIME type, authorship, and creation timestamp, plus a one-line body label.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w, h, source, author_session, created, and links fields
The MIME type is image/jpeg but w and h are both 0
The body reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-23.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured ledger metadata
Includes provenance fields such as author_session and created
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is unusual for an image record
No descriptive text about what the image depicts
The blob reference cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: This is a metadata stub for a design-source JPEG image in the capital-raise channel, but its dimensions are unset and it carries no descriptive caption.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-23.jpg contain?
Is the referenced blob resolvable and does it match this metadata?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a design ground-truth source image matches the metadata, but the record lacks actual image data, dimensions, and descriptive context, so it only partially fulfills that purpose.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register and ground-truth a source image asset by giving it a stable identity, channel taxonomy, and a content-addressed blob reference.
contribution: Provides a canonical identity, channel classification, and blob pointer for a design-source image asset, supporting retrieval, provenance, and integration into a fused asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata record for a design-source JPEG image named p-23 in the capital-raise channel, referencing blob b2:1bd3f0a1b5644e007d3058ee2a7bdc28, with zero dimensions, no links, and a ground-truth source label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and ground-truth a source image asset for the capital-raise design channel.
